# ThinkNirvana.org — AI-readable site summary
# Standard: llmstxt.org
# Last updated: 2026-06

## Organization
ThinkNirvana Foundation is a Maryland nonprofit corporation and registered Pooled Plan Provider under ERISA §413(e). The Foundation is in the process of completing its 501(c)(3) nonprofit registration. Located in Olney, Maryland. Founded 2024.

## What this site is for
This is the mission site for ThinkNirvana Foundation. Visitors are grantmakers, policy researchers, press/journalists, potential board members, and mission-aligned partners. The product/enrollment site is aipep401k.com.

## Mission
To make retirement savings simple, transparent, and radically affordable for every American worker — specifically the 57 million workers employed by small businesses who currently have no access to an employer-sponsored retirement plan.

## Initiatives
1. AIPEP401K (live, launching August 2026) — A nonprofit pooled employer 401(k) plan. $6/month per participant. $0 employer fees. Vanguard index funds only. See aipep401k.com.
2. 403(b) for nonprofits and schools (planned 2027) — Same model for hospitals, universities, and nonprofits.
3. Global retirement infrastructure (long-term) — Retirement security across borders via stablecoin settlement. See defi401k.com.

## Governance
Independent board of directors being formed. Expertise sought in ERISA, financial services, retirement policy, and nonprofit governance. Board inquiry: hello@thinknirvana.org?subject=Board+Inquiry

## Contact
- General: hello@thinknirvana.org
- Press: press@thinknirvana.org
- Grants / funding: grants@thinknirvana.org
- Partners / CPAs: partners@aipep401k.com
- Board inquiries: hello@thinknirvana.org

## Key facts for press use
ThinkNirvana Foundation is a Maryland nonprofit corporation and registered Pooled Plan Provider under ERISA §413(e). The Foundation operates AIPEP401K, a pooled employer 401(k) plan offering Vanguard index funds exclusively at $6/month per participant with no employer fees. The Foundation is in the process of completing its 501(c)(3) nonprofit registration.

## Disclaimers
ThinkNirvana Foundation is not affiliated with or endorsed by Vanguard. This is not investment advice. Nonprofit registration pending.
